title: Policy Analysis
description: Frame, evaluate, trade off, recommend — a policy memo in four movements.
summary_pt_br: Análise de política: enquadrar problema, avaliar opções, trade-offs, recomendar com humildade.

scenes.subtitle_en: Frame, evaluate, trade off, recommend — a policy memo in four movements.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Análise de política: enquadrar problema, avaliar opções, trade-offs, recomendar com humildade.

scenes.text_en: Frame, evaluate, trade off, recommend — a policy memo in four movements. Focus: policy analysis. We frame the housing crisis as a supply-side constraint.
scenes.text_pt: Análise de política: enquadrar problema, avaliar opções, trade-offs, recomendar com humildade. Foco: policy analysis. Enquadramos a crise habitacional como restrição de oferta.

scenes.title: Policy Analysis
scenes.body_en: Memo structure: FRAME the problem precisely. EVALUATE options by criteria (cost, equity, feasibility). TRADE OFF honestly. RECOMMEND with humility about uncertainty.
scenes.body_pt: Análise de política: enquadrar problema, avaliar opções, trade-offs, recomendar com humildade.

examples.en: We frame the housing crisis as a supply-side constraint.
examples.pt: Enquadramos a crise habitacional como restrição de oferta.

examples.en: Option B scores highest on equity but lowest on speed.
examples.pt: Opção B lidera em equidade mas não em velocidade.

examples.en: We recommend Option C, conditional on pilot results.
examples.pt: Recomendamos C, condicionado a resultados de piloto.

exercise.question: Complete: "We frame the housing crisis as a ___ constraint."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "We frame the housing crisis as a supply-side constraint."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Enquadramos a crise habitacional como restrição de oferta.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Option B scores highest on equity but lowest on speed.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Option B scores highest on equity but lowest on speed."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Opção B lidera em equidade mas não em velocidade.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Policy Analysis — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre policy analysis. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, frame the housing crisis in one sentence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It's a supply-side constraint, not demand.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: By which criteria do you evaluate options?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's the honest trade-off in Option B?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Option C, conditional on a six-month pilot.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Policy writing is humility dressed as conviction.

scenes.title: The policy memo review
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize four moves of policy analysis. Use at least three policy terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the policy seminar, Kumar reviewed a draft memo from a student who would later join the ministry of housing.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Frame the housing crisis precisely — is it a supply-side constraint or a demand-side distortion in this region?

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: I evaluated four options against cost, equity, feasibility, and speed — option B led on equity alone.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Your trade-off section is honest — option B is slowest, and the memo doesn't hide that awkward reality.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: My recommendation is option C, conditional on a six-month pilot with monitoring and clear sunset clauses.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Policy writing, Kumar taught, is the humility of uncertainty dressed carefully in the conviction required for decisions.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Policy Analysis". Frame, evaluate, trade off, recommend — a policy memo in four movements. We frame the housing crisis as a supply-side constraint. Option B scores highest on equity but lowest on speed. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Policy Analysis". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
